title: Designing at the pace of model drops
speakers: Rodrigo Lemes (Ux Principal and OPS director, Mercado Livre), Paige Costello (VP Product, Figma)
key_points: Mercado Libre has cultivated a culture that encourages risk-taking, making mistakes, and trying again, sustained across a large org of over 1,500 designers within a 30,000-person product, design, and engineering organization spanning many countries, languages, and cultures.
The conversation explores how the company translates its values into everyday practice, keeping a large organization curious, autonomous, and willing to be wrong.
It addresses the rising stakes of AI reshaping design tools almost weekly, and what it takes to design and adapt at that pace.
Framed as a discussion between Mercado Libre Principal Designer Rodrigo Lemes and Figma VP Product Paige Costello.
